title: Collab Graph data file
description: Validates the whole dataset: a list of artists and a list of connections. Wire this into CI (e.g. ajv) so malformed submissions are rejected automatically.

id.description: Stable lowercase slug, no spaces. Never change it once connections point at it.

disambiguation.description: Short note to tell same-named artists apart, e.g. 'Seattle grunge band' vs '1960s British psych band'. Shown next to the name in search. Recommended whenever two artists share a name.

mbid.description: MusicBrainz ID — the durable global identifier. Strongly recommended.

spotify.description: Optional link to the artist's own Spotify page (open.spotify.com/artist/...).

apple.description: Optional link to the artist's own Apple Music page.

from.description: Artist id. For 'member' this is the person; for a performance credit this is the guest/contributor.

to.description: Artist id. For 'member' this is the band; for a performance credit this is the host act whose track it is.

rel.description: v1 scope: direct artist-to-artist relationships only. cover / sample / remix / writer_credit / producer_credit are reserved for a later, separate class.

song.description: The track. Required for collaboration and guest_performer; omit for member.

by.description: Optional human-readable credit line / context shown in the panel.

source.description: Link to the CREDIT that proves who performed (MusicBrainz recording/relationship, Apple Music credits, liner notes). A bare streaming link proves the song exists, not who is on it, so those domains are rejected here.

spotify.description: Optional 'Copy Song Link' share URL for the track.

apple.description: Optional Apple Music share URL for the track.

isCover.description: True when the performance is of a song originated by a third party. The connection is still real; this flag lets viewers filter it out.

addedBy.description: Contributor handle. Usually filled in from the submitter.

verified.description: Set by MAINTAINERS ONLY after checking the source. Contributors must not set this true; new submissions default to false and render dimmed until reviewed.

then.description: Membership is a structural relationship, not a track, so it carries no song.
